title: Protocols & Tooling
description: What people are building and the tools they use.

stops.title: DEX: Minswap
stops.narrative: [Minswap](node:minswap) is the largest Cardano DEX by TVL. Multi-pool AMM written in [Aiken](node:aiken). Batchers collect user swap orders and settle them against pool UTxOs — the standard DEX architecture on EUTxO.

stops.title: Lending: Liqwid Finance
stops.narrative: [Liqwid](node:liqwid) is the leading lending/borrowing protocol. Uses [Plutarch](node:plutarch) for performance-critical validators. DAO-governed. Demonstrates complex multi-contract DeFi on [EUTxO](node:eutxo).

stops.title: Scaling: Hydra L2
stops.narrative: [Hydra](node:hydra) is Cardano's Layer 2 — isomorphic state channels that [replicate the full EUTxO model](node:eutxo) off-chain. Sub-second latency, 1,000 TPS per head. Same smart contract model as L1, so existing contracts work.

stops.title: Off-Chain: Lucid & Mesh
stops.narrative: [Lucid Evolution](node:lucid-evolution) and [Mesh SDK](node:mesh-sdk) are the main TypeScript libraries for building transactions that interact with [Plutus](node:plutus) validators. [Blockfrost](node:blockfrost) provides chain indexing APIs. [Demeter](node:demeter) offers cloud infrastructure.
